title: PPL Corporation: Strategic Acquisition To Drive Significant Growth
text: The strategic acquisition of Narragansett Electric Company helps PPL expand its operations in the United States. Strong Q1 2022 result, with a solid future outlook.

title: These 10 stocks from a sector that is a bear-market bulwark have upside potential of up to 30%
text: During times of uncertainty, it can help to look at what happened during other down cycles for stocks.
